title: helianthemum variabile var. hispidum
intro: Helianthemum variabile var. hispidum, also known as Rock Rose, is a shrubby perennial plant belonging to the family Cistaceae. Traditionally used in herbal medicine, Rock Rose is valued for its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties, which are attributed to its high concentration of flavonoids, phenolic acids, and terpenes. The plant has been used to treat various health issues, including wounds, skin conditions, and respiratory problems, and is also believed to have antioxidant and immunomodulatory effects. Rock Rose can be prepared in various forms, including infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used topically or internally to harness its medicinal benefits.
